reboot.note: Reboot complete: typecheck clean, no test regressions (test dirs empty, expected pre-S1.8).

select.note: Plan: new file src/core/Engine.ts, generic Engine<TWorld> class wrapping StateManager+System[]+Clock. tick(realDelta) reads state, calls Clock.advance once, loops steps commiting each new snapshot (tick+1, systems pipeline), persists clock even at 0 steps to avoid losing banked accumulator. Exposes interpolationAlpha getter. Test: test/unit/Engine.test.ts covering step counting, tick increment, system pipeline order, commit continuity, interpolationAlpha, accumulator persistence across zero-step calls.

plan.note: Anchor: new module, no existing dependents to preserve. Type boundary: Engine<TWorld>{ constructor({systems, stateManager}); tick(realDeltaSeconds:number): GameState<TWorld>; get interpolationAlpha(): number }. Depends only on already-typechecked Clock/State/System/StateManager (read-only imports).

anchor.note: Implement: src/core/Engine.ts written — generic Engine<TWorld> class, tick() Read->Process->Emit loop, interpolationAlpha getter.

implement.note: Verify: npm test green (9/9 Engine tests pass: step counting, tick+1 per step, accumulator persistence across zero-step ticks, system pipeline order, StateManager commit continuity/prev-current, no in-place mutation, interpolationAlpha, generic empty-pipeline). Also added @types/node devDependency (required for node:test/node:assert typings under noImplicitAny/strict).

verify.note: Integrate: PKG updated — core/engine node added, dependency+dependent edges wired (clock, state, state_manager, system), pending_nodes cleared, gdos_anchors Section_16 extended, pkg_hash bumped s1-c3d4e5 -> s1-e6f7a8. dm-0007 recorded (zero-step commit persists clock accumulator).

integrate.note: Report: S1.7 flipped IN_PROGRESS->COMPLETED in docs/task_slices.md (not VERIFIED — phase-1 verification report/backlog REQ flips deferred to S1.10 per protocol). REQ-121/REQ-160 backlog rows left as-is (multi-phase REQs, not fully satisfied by this slice alone).

report.note: Handoff written: meta/handoff_latest.json updated with S1.7 completion, pkg_hash s1-e6f7a8, next focus S1.8.

acceptance.criterion: Engine.tick() is a deterministic state processor: pure fixed-step loop over Clock/System/StateManager, no gameplay assumptions, covered by 9 passing unit tests.

Zero-alloc-AWARE per S1.7 scope (no gratuitous per-frame allocation beyond the immutability contract's required snapshot copies; no closures/arrays allocated in hot loop). Full zero-allocation pooling is out of scope here, deferred to P3/P11 per dm-0004; REQ-160's P3/P11 backlog scope remains NOT_STARTED.
